channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Senate prepares to vote on Trump's SAVE Act. And, takeaways from last night's Oscars
item.description: Senate Republicans are gearing up to vote on President Trump's controversial voting overhaul, the SAVE America Act. And, key takeaways from the 2026 Oscars.
item.content:encoded:
Senate Republicans are gearing up to vote on President Trump's controversial voting overhaul, the SAVE America Act. And, key takeaways from the 2026 Oscars.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Trump threatens NATO allies over Strait of Hormuz help
item.description: With the Iran war in its third week and the price of oil reaching nearly $105 a barrel on Monday, President Trump again urged NATO and China to help secure the vital Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded:
With the Iran war in its third week and the price of oil reaching nearly $105 a barrel on Monday, President Trump again urged NATO and China to help secure the vital Strait of Hormuz.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Oil and gas prices are soaring. Some countries are ready with solar panels and EVs
item.description: As an energy crisis grows, some countries are more prepared because of renewable energy and electric vehicles. Pakistan reduced its reliance on imported natural gas because of the growth of solar.
item.content:encoded:
As an energy crisis grows, some countries are more prepared because of renewable energy and electric vehicles. Pakistan reduced its reliance on imported natural gas because of the growth of solar.

(Image credit: Asif Hassan)
item.dc:creator: Julia Simon

item.title: Influencers push 'parasite cleanses' but doctors say to steer clear
item.description: Some people online believe many of us have dangerous parasites in our gut and need to flush them out with herbal supplements. Here's what doctors say about the trend.
item.content:encoded: Some people online believe many of us have dangerous parasites in our gut and need to flush them out with herbal supplements. Here's what doctors say about the trend.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Boden

item.title: As parents clamor for a treatment touted for autism, doctors hesitate to prescribe it
item.description: After leucovorin got public attention as a potential autism treatment, families rushed to get it. Many doctors are torn about prescribing an unproven drug but don't want to lose patients' trust.
item.content:encoded: After leucovorin got public attention as a potential autism treatment, families rushed to get it. Many doctors are torn about prescribing an unproven drug but don't want to lose patients' trust.
item.dc:creator: Michal Ruprecht

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: The war with Iran enters its third week, as Trump and his top aides refocus their messaging on "winning" to regain faltering support, in the Senate, Republican lawmakers take up the SAVE Act this week.
item.content:encoded: The war with Iran enters its third week, as Trump and his top aides refocus their messaging on "winning" to regain faltering support, in the Senate, Republican lawmakers take up the SAVE Act this week.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: 5th member of Iranian women's soccer team gives up asylum in Australia
item.description: The player's departure shortly before midnight on Sunday leaves two of an initial seven squad members in Australia.
item.content:encoded:
The player's departure shortly before midnight on Sunday leaves two of an initial seven squad members in Australia.

(Image credit: STR/AFP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 5 takeaways from an Oscars night that spread the love
item.description: It's thrilling to see the Academy recognize a weird, funny, scary performance like Amy Madigan's in Weapons. Here's what NPR critic Linda Holmes thought of the awards.
item.content:encoded:
It's thrilling to see the Academy recognize a weird, funny, scary performance like Amy Madigan's in Weapons. Here's what NPR critic Linda Holmes thought of the awards.

(Image credit: Mike Coppola)
item.dc:creator: Linda Holmes

item.title: 'One Battle After Another' takes best picture. Here's the full list of Oscar winners
item.description: Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley won best actor and best actress. Paul Thomas Anderson received best director. Cassandra Kulukundis won the Academy's first ever casting award.
item.content:encoded:
Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley won best actor and best actress. Paul Thomas Anderson received best director. Cassandra Kulukundis won the Academy's first ever casting award.

(Image credit: Kevin Winter)
item.dc:creator: Clare Lombardo

item.title: Selection Sunday: Duke No. 1 overall in men's tournament, UConn women get top seed
item.description: Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.
item.content:encoded:
Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.

(Image credit: Jacob Kupferman)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan
